introSection: Cilgin Kopekbaligi (English: Mad Shark) is a steel indoor roller coasters currently standing but not operating at Fun Lab in Istanbul, Istanbul, Turkey.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The coaster starts with a right turn, followed by the first chain lift hill. This first lift ends abruptly, followed by an inclined right turn. A second smaller chain lift hill follows this turn, bringing the train up to the first floor of the building. This is followed by another right turn and a right oriented curved drop, leading into a righthanded Helix. The final brake run immediatly follows after this helix, giving this layout no left hand turns.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Blue track and orange supports. It originally opened with blue supports.

sections.title: Train
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a shark.

fullText:
Cilgin Kopekbaligi (English: Mad Shark) is a steel indoor roller coasters currently standing but not operating at Fun Lab in Istanbul, Istanbul, Turkey.

The coaster starts with a right turn, followed by the first chain lift hill. This first lift ends abruptly, followed by an inclined right turn. A second smaller chain lift hill follows this turn, bringing the train up to the first floor of the building. This is followed by another right turn and a right oriented curved drop, leading into a righthanded Helix. The final brake run immediatly follows after this helix, giving this layout no left hand turns.

Blue track and orange supports. It originally opened with blue supports.

The train is designed to resemble a shark.
